title: Aehr Test Systems Stock Analysis and Forecast
text: An independent analysis of Aehr Test Systems indicates the company is positioned for multi-year growth driven by secular trends in semiconductor testing automation. The company's wafer-level burn-in solutions are becoming increasingly critical for manufacturers producing advanced chips for AI, data centers, and electric vehicles. With a $50.9 million effective backlog and analyst expectations for 71% revenue growth in fiscal 2027, the company has substantial visibility. The analyst forecast includes a return to profitability in fiscal 2027 with earnings of $0.15 per share. Key risks include execution risk, valuation compression, and potential slowdown in customer orders.
